title: momoliik mod
description:
Do you want pig milk, maybe amogus 
or other cursed changes. Well then this mod is for you.
body: # SKIBIDI MOD ![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1ade527c5793d9873c4bdc3cab430e34950d769.png) # want a cursed mod, here it is!!! **Want pig milk, a nerd block, jj flexing his jawline in an item or amogus, This is the mod** **this mod is my changes to vanilla minecraft like new blocks new fluids and items mobs biomes and more also adds a piston with a block texture (better psiton: see in gallery)** # Do you want? **wanna plant tnt, or have fake wish\.com tnt, maybe amogus, oh oh oh i want a new biome well this mod is the right place** # who is this for? **this mod is for people who want a cursed mod that adds random things which are very cursed like a nerd block or amogus mod league of legends biome or E dimension** # what changes excactly **all the blocks items and everything can be seen in the gallery photo** **but here is a list:** - EEEEEEEEEEEEEE (block - league of legends (biome) - amogus (mob) - mom (pickaxe) - K (painting) - nerd (block) - E (dimension) - pigmilk (fluid) - jj (item) - ayo (music disc) - Kkk (block) - poyom (potion) - TNT (plant) - Faketnt (block) - betterpiston (block that acts like a piston) - teeplortoto # loader **FORGE ONLY. This will not support fabric,quilt or neoforge** [![Download Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/static/images/logo.svg)](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/) # does this work in survival **no it doesnt its creative only. you cant get these items in survival**
